interests.title: Interests
interests.summary: Choose interests that match you to get better product and design suggestions across the shop and creator tools.
tips: Choose interests that match you to get better suggestions.
You can select up to 10 interests.
New interest? Type it and I will suggest matching terms.

community.title: Community
community.summary: Grow your network with referral links and earn commission across up to 10 levels.

Your network has 10 levels and each level earns commission.
Use promo codes to win new partners.

generate-design.title: Design Generator
generate-design.summary: Create AI designs from a text prompt or reference image, then save and publish them.
tips: The more detailed your prompt, the better the result.
You can upload your own image as a reference.
Try different styles for unique designs.
After generation, you can publish the design directly.

my-creations.title: My Creations
my-creations.summary: Browse, filter, and manage all designs you have generated or uploaded.
tips: Click a design to see more options.

Unsaved designs are deleted after 30 days.

publish.title: Publish Products
publish.summary: Place your design on print-on-demand products and publish them to the shop.
tips: Select a design first, then choose products.

After publishing, you can find the product in the shop.
